seoTitle: Lavender Bay vs Lavington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lavender Bay and Lavington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lavender Bay vs Lavington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lavender Bay and Lavington.
heading: Lavender Bay vs Lavington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lavender Bay, New South Wales and Lavington, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lavington has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Lavender Bay (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lavender Bay or Lavington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lavender Bay has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Lavington scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lavender Bay scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Lavington scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lavender Bay or Lavington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lavington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
